pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in task.json instructions, export_result.sh OUTPUT_EDDX variable, and verifier.py logic.
Explicitly defined in task.json instructions, export_result.sh OUTPUT_PNG variable, and verifier.py logic.
Derived from task.json instruction 6 text labels. Verifier checks for these exact substrings within the EDDX zip archive's XML contents.
Code analysis of verifier.py confirms there is no size threshold check; the verifier only checks for file existence and recent modification time.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates synthetically, requiring the generative creation of an isometric piping diagram from scratch in EdrawMax. The expected output file paths (/home/ga/Diagrams/cooling_loop_iso.eddx and /home/ga/Diagrams/cooling_loop_iso.png) are fully confirmed by task instructions, export scripts, and verifier logic. The required textual labels (T-100, P-101, HX-200, Feed Tank, Circulation Pump, Cooler) are correctly verified against the task prompt and are explicitly checked for presence within the XML content of the generated EDDX archive by the verifier.
